properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v4 v5 v6 v1 v4 v7 v1 v4 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You're making me a fighter, a fighter You're taking me higher, higher You're giving me the strength I need to believe Life is worth living'cause You love me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So many people up ahead of me Feels like I'll never see the finish line I hear the voices of the enemy Telling me I'll never see the other side

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: But it's not what they say It's not what I think That defines who I am I need Your voice I need Your words To remind me again

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And that's enough, that's enough That's enough You love me You're enough, You're enough You're enough, enough for me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: If you take away my abilities I still know who I'm meant to be I can overcome anything 'Cause Your Spirit is alive in me

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Only Your voice Only Your words Can define who I am I need Your voice I need Your words To remind me again

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I am chosen and redeemed Your love has set me free You define my identity, oh I am seen and I am known You call me as Your own You define my identity, yeah

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: And that's enough, that's enough That's enough You love me You're enough, You're enough You're enough, enough for me.
